mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action vagueness + Semantic de‑specificity: "player"→"one" (specific actor→generic pronoun) | "came in"→"did something" (specific placement verb→vague placeholder) | domain/context narrowed (competition ranking→unspecified action) (which player came in first?→which one did something first?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述“Explanation: The only notion of “first” indicated in the table is the “rank” column. The player with rank 1 (i.e., first) is Jansher Khan…”，Agent直接将变异问题按原问题的排名含义处理并给出具体答案“Jansher Khan”。Agent未提及模糊、不确定或需澄清的词汇，也未在日志中展示任何疑问或请求更多信息的行为。综上，Agent没有识别出变异问题中主体泛化、动作模糊和语义去专指的问题，直接按照默认理解执行，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”类别。
